sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ الْقَصَصُ الْقَدِيمُ جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ التُّرَاثِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Stare priče se smatraju važnim dijelom arapskog naslijeđa.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient stories are considered an important part of Arabic heritage.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجَدَّاتُ يَحْكِينَ حِكَايَاتٍ مُمْتِعَةً لِلْأَطْفَالِ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Nane su nekada pričale zanimljive priče djeci prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Grandmothers used to tell enjoyable tales to children before sleep.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ النَّاسُ الْكَثِيرَ مِنَ الْحِكَمِ مِنْ هَذِهِ الْقِصَصِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su naučili mnogo mudrosti iz ovih priča.
sentences.translationEn: People learned many wisdoms from these stories.

sentences.arabic: الْيَوْمَ، نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الرِّوَايَاتِ فِي الْكُتُبِ الْمَدْرَسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Danas te romane čitamo u školskim knjigama.
sentences.translationEn: Today, we read these novels in school books.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ قِصَّةٍ لَهَا بَطَلٌ يَسْعَى لِتَحْقِيقِ هَدَفٍ نَبِيلٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaka priča ima heroja koji teži ostvarenju plemenitog cilja.
sentences.translationEn: Every story has a hero seeking to achieve a noble goal.
